sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif pragmatique + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-format comprehension), then self-audited before commit. Covers the three question registers and la question avec inversion (noun-subject reprise, euphonic -t-, auxiliary-only inversion in compound tenses). First unit of b1.2. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ 3 (Hachette), Dossier 6 'Je me cultive' (faire une interview; l'interrogation, la question avec inversion; thème: interviews de célébrités, quiz de culture générale). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
